item.title: 6 Missing, 2 Dead—Is This Cult to Blame?
item.description: An overview of a case involving an online figure connected to several disappearances, focusing on the investigation, allegations, and ongoing developments.

media:content.media:title: 6 Missing, 2 Dead—Is This Cult to Blame?
media:content.media:description: An overview of a case involving an online figure connected to several disappearances, focusing on the investigation, allegations, and ongoing developments.
